texto: I just wish she knew that if there were two persons, who were imperfect and they knew it, and they weren’t afraid to admit it – if those two persons cared enough about one another to lean upon one another, they’d be stronger together than they were separately – like a flying buttress and a cathedral wall.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Christine Plouvier: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “I just wish she knew that if there were two persons, who were imperfect and they knew it, and the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, relationships pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e relationships.

frase_original: I just wish she knew that if there were two persons, who were imperfect and they knew it, and they weren’t afraid to admit it – if those two persons cared enough about one another to lean upon one another, they’d be stronger together than they were separately – like a flying buttress and a cathedral wall.
